prompt:
Add Sonarr diagnostic tools for debugging download and indexer problems. See issue #5 for the full list.

## Context

reel-life is a media curation agent (Go, Claude API). The Sonarr client is in `internal/sonarr/client.go` with types in `internal/sonarr/types.go`. Tools are defined in `internal/agent/tools.go` (follow the `sonarrToolDefs()` pattern) and dispatched in `internal/agent/agent.go:dispatchTool()`.

The existing Sonarr tools cover basic operations (search, add, queue, history, health, remove_failed). We need deeper diagnostic tools.

## What to build

### New Sonarr client methods in `internal/sonarr/client.go`

Add these methods to the `Client` interface and `HTTPClient` implementation:

1. **`GetSeries(ctx, seriesID int) (*Series, error)`** — `GET /api/v3/series/{id}`
   - Returns full series detail: title, episode count, episode file count, size on disk, monitored, quality profile ID, path

2. **`GetEpisodes(ctx, seriesID int) ([]Episode, error)`** — `GET /api/v3/episode?seriesId={id}`
   - Returns episodes: season/episode number, title, hasFile, monitored, airDateUtc

3. **`GetLogs(ctx, pageSize int, level string) ([]LogRecord, error)`** — `GET /api/v3/log?pageSize={n}&sortDirection=descending`
   - Optionally filter by level (info/warn/error). Returns: time, level, logger, message, exception

4. **`ManualSearch(ctx, episodeID int) ([]Release, error)`** — `GET /api/v3/release?episodeId={id}`
   - Returns available releases: title, indexer, quality, size, age, rejected bool, rejections []string

5. **`GetQualityProfiles(ctx) ([]QualityProfile, error)`** — `GET /api/v3/qualityprofile`
   - Returns profiles: id, name, cutoff quality, items

6. **`GetBlocklist(ctx, pageSize int) (*BlocklistPage, error)`** — `GET /api/v3/blocklist?pageSize={n}`
   - Returns blocklisted releases: id, seriesId, sourceTitle, date

7. **`GetRootFolders(ctx) ([]RootFolder, error)`** — `GET /api/v3/rootfolder`
   - Returns: path, freeSpace, totalSpace

8. **`GetDownloadClients(ctx) ([]DownloadClient, error)`** — `GET /api/v3/downloadclient`
   - Returns: name, enable, protocol, priority

### New types in `internal/sonarr/types.go`

Add: `Series` (full detail), `Episode`, `LogRecord`, `Release`, `QualityProfile`, `BlocklistItem`, `BlocklistPage`, `RootFolder`, `DownloadClient`

Keep types minimal — only include fields the agent actually needs. Don't map the entire Sonarr API response.

### New tool definitions in `internal/agent/tools.go`

Add 8 new tools to `sonarrToolDefs()` following the existing pattern:

| Tool | Input | Destructive |
|------|-------|-------------|
| `get_series_detail` | `series_id` (int) | No |
| `get_episodes` | `series_id` (int) | No |
| `get_logs` | `page_size` (int, optional), `level` (string, optional) | No |
| `manual_search` | `episode_id` (int) | No |
| `get_quality_profiles` | none | No |
| `get_blocklist` | `page_size` (int, optional) | No |
| `get_root_folders` | none | No |
| `get_download_clients` | none | No |

All are read-only — none should be in the `destructiveTools` map.

### Tool dispatch in `internal/agent/agent.go`

Add cases to `dispatchTool()` for all 8 tools. Follow the existing Sonarr dispatch pattern (lines ~180-230 in agent.go).

### System prompt update

Add to the capabilities list in `systemPrompt` (agent.go):
- Get detailed series info and episode status
- Search for available releases and see why they were accepted/rejected
- View Sonarr logs for debugging
- Check quality profiles, blocklist, root folders, and download client status

### Tests

- Add tests for the new client methods in `internal/sonarr/client_test.go` (follow existing httptest pattern if one exists, or add mock server tests)
- Add dispatch tests in `internal/agent/agent_test.go` for the new tools

### Acceptance criteria
- `go build ./...` passes
- `go test ./...` passes
- `go vet ./...` passes
- All 8 new tools work in the agent dispatch loop
- Types are minimal — only fields the agent needs
